name: tier2_cci_inline_in_text
description: Tier 2 text-scrape path: a STIG .ckl body contains a CCI string but no parsed stig_findings rows (extractor missed it inside finding_details free-text). _CCI_RE scrapes the body the same way it scrapes a parsed cci_refs field and produces the same 0.95/1.0 tag. Filename is scan.ckl so the kind-gate (added 2026-06-07) lets the text-scrape branch fire; under a policy.pdf this case would correctly produce 0 tags. Pins the STIG narrative-text fallback path that 2026 STIG requirements depend on.

evidence.text: This STIG checklist addresses CCI-000015 directly.
